scripts.review:quick: cd frontend && bun run test:silent && cd ../backend && php artisan test --parallel
scripts.typecheck:frontend: cd frontend && bun x tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit
scripts.api:generate: cd backend && php artisan l5-swagger:generate && cd ../frontend && bun run api:generate
scripts.api:check: cd backend && php artisan l5-swagger:generate && test -s storage/api-docs/api-docs.json && cd ../frontend && bun run api:check
